title: Error accessing N8N due to HTTP instead of HTTPS
symptom: When trying to create a new workflow and add a trigger, the error 'storewindow.crypto.randomUUID is not a function' appears.
applies_when: TrueNAS server is configured for HTTPS
not_this_if: N8N is already configured to run on HTTPS
root_cause: The error occurs because the n8n application relies on secure context features that are only available when accessed over HTTPS. If n8n is running over HTTP, certain JavaScript functions, like crypto.randomUUID, may not be available, leading to this error.
agent_instruction: Select the 'truenas_default' Certificate in n8n settings to enable HTTPS.
